title: Notification
description: An inline or prominent banner that communicates status, warnings, or important information.
whenToUse: To communicate system status, warnings, or important context. Info (neutral info), success (confirmation), warning (caution), error (critical).
whenNotToUse: For transient feedback — use a toast instead. For blocking confirmations — use a dialog.

keyboard.action: Move focus to the dismiss button (if dismissible)

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="alert" for critical/error messages. Dismiss buttons need aria-label="Dismiss".
